title: Royal Blue Polka Dots Cellophane Bags (27cm x 12cm) Pack of 20 - Stylish Gift and Treat Bags for Parties and Events
features: STYLISH & VIBRANT DESIGN: These royal blue polka dots cellophane bags add a pop of color to your parties and events, making them perfect for gifting while impressing your guests and friends.
HIGH-QUALITY CELLOPHANE MATERIAL: Our 27cm x 12cm cellophane bags are resistant to tears, ensuring your treats and gifts stay securely inside and maintain their presentation.
PACK OF 20: With each purchase, you receive 20 royal blue polka dots cellophane bags, providing enough supply for your festivities and serving as an excellent value for your money.
MULTIPURPOSE USE: These attractive cellophane bags are great for birthdays, baby showers, weddings, and holiday gatherings, perfect for gift wrapping or packaging treats, candies, and party favors.
EASY TO CUSTOMIZE: Add ribbons, stickers, or tags to personalize your royal blue polka dots cellophane bags, making them unique, memorable gifts for your loved ones or event attendees.
description: Product Description Create eye-catching party favours to thank guests for attending with these Cellophane Royal Blue Polka Dot Party Bags. Featuring a classic royal blue and white polka dot design, these eye-catching cellophane bags are ideal at a birthday party, fundraiser, graduation party, Hanukkah celebration or other special occasion. These cellophane bags are ideal for filling with sweets, party cake or party bag fillers at the end of your event. Cello bags can also be combined with tissue paper to wrap small gifts for a stylish presentation.
